title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 547.080 - Writs of error
text:
547.080.  Writs of error. — Writs of error upon any such final judgment are writs of right, and, on application therefor, shall issue of course, in vacation as well as in term, out of the court in which by law they may be made returnable.
(RSMo 1939 § 4131) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3741; 1919 § 4087; 1909 § 5293
